ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enrolment" (
  "enrolment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrolment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "enrolment" INTEGER /* Enrolment number of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school */,
  "percentage_of_students_whose_first_language_is_not_english" REAL /* Percentage of students whose first language is not English */,
  "percentage_of_students_whose_first_language_is_not_french" REAL /* Percentage of students whose first language is not French */,
  "percentage_of_students_who_are_new_to_canada_from_a_non_english_speaking_country" REAL /* Percentage of students who are new to Canada from a non-English speaking country */,
  "percentage_of_students_who_are_new_to_canada_from_a_non_french_speaking_country" REAL /* Percentage of students who are new to Canada from a non-French speaking country */,
  "percentage_of_students_receiving_special_education_services" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving special education services */,
  "percentage_of_students_identified_as_gifted" REAL /* Percentage of students identified as gifted */,
  "enrolment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrolment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrolment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extract_dates" (
  "extract_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extract date record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "extract_date" TEXT /* Date of extract */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data extracted (e.g., enrolment, performance metrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extract_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., academic, extracurricular) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., academic, administrative) */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each enrolment record
Percentage of students whose first language is not English
Percentage of students whose first language is not French
Percentage of students who are new to Canada from a non-English speaking country
Percentage of students who are new to Canada from a non-French speaking country

Percentage of students identified as gifted
